algos.name: Google Trends Surge In Flight Delay Complaints
algos.thesis_one_liner: Sharp spikes in Google search volume for flight delay complaints signal operational stress in airlines and airports, often preceding earnings pressure or guidance cuts.

algos.name: Weekly Spike In Rss News Counts On Port Labor Strikes Signals Freight Logistics Disruption
algos.thesis_one_liner: Increased media coverage of port labor strikes correlates with short-term shipping delays and inventory bottlenecks.

algos.name: Mortgage Rate Housing Proxy
algos.thesis_one_liner: Mortgage Rate Housing Proxy tests whether source data can reveal consumer stress or demand rotation before it shows up in sector performance.

algos.name: Recession Whisper Google Trends Unemployment Search Surge
algos.thesis_one_liner: When combined search interest in unemployment + layoff terms spikes >40% above 52-week baseline in a single week, consumer anxiety peaks.

algos.name: Earthquake Aftershock Insurance Claims Spike
algos.thesis_one_liner: Clusters of moderate earthquakes in populated regions trigger immediate insurance claim filings and property damage estimates, creating short-term sector rotation into insurance and repair stocks.

algos.name: Daily Jump In Consumer Stress Google Trends Searches For Car Repossession Signals Rising Financial Distress
algos.thesis_one_liner: Spikes in searches for repossession indicate consumer financial strain that may impact discretionary spending.

algos.name: Weekly Surge In Google Trends Searches For Home Improvement Loan Signals Consumer Stress Lifting Xly
algos.thesis_one_liner: Rising interest in home improvement loans often signals increased consumer willingness to spend on discretionary housing-related retail items.

algos.name: Rss News Volume Spike On Corporate Bond Downgrades Signals Credit Stress Rotation
algos.thesis_one_liner: Daily spike in downgrade-related news articles (>150% of 20-day average) predicts 3-5 day financials sector weakness as credit risk reprices.

algos.name: Earthquake Aftershock Amplifier
algos.thesis_one_liner: Significant earthquake events can trigger increased aftershock activity, which may signal volatility and uncertainty in energy and industrial sectors.

algos.name: Earthquake Activity Cluster Signal For Insurance And Utility Sector
algos.thesis_one_liner: Weekly earthquake count in California, Pacific Northwest, or Intermountain zones exceeds historical median by >60%, signaling heightened seismic risk.

algos.name: Weekly Surge In Rss Counts For Port Congestion News Signals Industrial Headwinds
algos.thesis_one_liner: Increase in congestion news signals supply chain bottlenecks and industrial sector pressure.

algos.name: Usgs Earthquake Activity Spike Near Major Freight Hubs Signals Temporary Freight Disruption
algos.thesis_one_liner: A sudden increase in earthquake tremors near major freight hubs can disrupt logistics and shipping routes, impacting industrial production.

algos.name: Port Congestion News Spike Signals Logistics Headwind Reversal Trade
algos.thesis_one_liner: Spikes in port congestion news often precede rapid clearance periods as supply chains self-correct, creating short-duration bullish trades in logistics and transport sectors.

algos.name: Google Trends Surge In Used Car Price Searches
algos.thesis_one_liner: Spike in searches for used car pricing signals consumer anxiety about vehicle affordability and resale values, often preceding used car market weakness.

algos.name: Price Momentum Reversion In Defensive Sectors After Tech Crash
algos.thesis_one_liner: When XLK underperforms XLV by >4% over 5 consecutive trading days, it often signals fear-driven rotation into defensive healthcare; subsequent mean reversion favors tech outperformance.

algos.name: Healthcare Cost Inflation Google Trends Acceleration
algos.thesis_one_liner: When combined search index for healthcare cost anxiety spikes 80%+ above 8-week baseline, it signals consumer stress, pressuring discretionary spending and benefiting defensive healthcare.

algos.name: Materials Sector Weekly Positive Correlation Breakdown With Xlb
algos.thesis_one_liner: When XLB weekly returns decouple negatively from SPY returns for 2 consecutive weeks, a rebound in XLB often follows.

algos.name: Daily Jump In Google Trends For Home Building Permit Delay Signals Local Economy Construction Stress Hurting Real Estate Sector
algos.thesis_one_liner: Rising searches for building permit delays indicate municipal bottlenecks slowing construction starts, pressuring real estate development outlook.

algos.name: Semiconductor Moonshot Warning
algos.thesis_one_liner: Semiconductors often experience large daily price jumps, which can signal speculative froth and increased risk of a pullback.

algos.name: Daily Spike In Usgs Earthquake Activity Near Key Industrial Hubs
algos.thesis_one_liner: A sudden rise in earthquake activity near industrial hubs can disrupt supply chains and production temporarily.

algos.name: Weekly Google Trends Spike For Diy Home Renovation Signals Bullish Consumer Staples
algos.thesis_one_liner: Increased interest in DIY home renovation reflects consumer cost-saving behavior and boosts demand for staples and home improvement products.

algos.name: News Sentiment Surge On Corporate Cost-cutting Announcements Signals Equity Volatility Expansion

algos.name: Daily Spike In Rss News Counts On Corporate Cybersecurity Breaches Signals Tech Sector Volatility
algos.thesis_one_liner: Increased cybersecurity breach news coverage often triggers short-term price swings and risk aversion.

algos.name: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Emergency Dental Care Signals Consumer Stress Impacting Health Sector
algos.thesis_one_liner: Increased emergency dental queries indicate rising consumer health emergencies and cost stress.

algos.name: Healthcare Procedure Google Trends Demand Resurgence
algos.thesis_one_liner: Spikes in elective procedure searches signal consumer confidence and disposable income recovery; bullish for consumer discretionary and healthcare services.

algos.name: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Car Repossession Signals Rising Consumer Financial Distress
algos.thesis_one_liner: Sudden increases in car repossession searches reflect rising financial distress impacting consumer discretionary demand.

algos.name: Weekly Surge In Rss News Counts On Commodity Shortage Signals Industrial Sector Headwinds
algos.thesis_one_liner: Rising news coverage on commodity shortages signals supply chain disruptions and cost pressures for industrial firms.

algos.name: Weekly Surge In Rss News Counts Mentioning Warehouse Capacity Crunch Signals Industrial Bottleneck
algos.thesis_one_liner: Increased news coverage on warehouse capacity issues signals supply chain constraints and industrial sector pressure.

algos.name: Weekly Surge In Rss News Counts Mentioning Consumer Coupon Usage Signals Consumer Stress Relief
algos.thesis_one_liner: Rising news coverage about coupon usage correlates with consumer attempts to stretch budgets, often preceding staples sector strength.

algos.name: Weekly Surge In Freight Logistics Google Trends For Cargo Theft
algos.thesis_one_liner: Increased cargo theft searches indicate rising supply chain risk and potential insurance claims.

algos.name: Weekly Google Trends Surge For Truck Driver Shortage Signals Freight Logistics Risk And Industrial Cost Pressure
algos.thesis_one_liner: Rising interest in truck driver shortages signals constrained freight capacity that can raise costs and slow industrial throughput.

algos.name: Staples Sector Drawdown Rapid Recovery
algos.thesis_one_liner: When XLP falls 3%+ in 3 days but bounces back 1%+ on the 4th day, it often signals short-term oversold relief.

algos.name: Daily Jump In Google Trends For Food Poisoning Outbreak Boosts Healthcare Sector Demand
algos.thesis_one_liner: Increasing searches for food poisoning outbreaks signal rising healthcare visits and stress.

algos.name: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Last Minute Vacation Bookings Signals Travel Demand Spike
algos.thesis_one_liner: A spike in last minute vacation booking searches usually precedes increased travel activity and discretionary spending on travel-related services.

algos.name: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Diy Roof Repair Signals Consumer Stress Lifting Industrial Sector
algos.thesis_one_liner: Rising DIY repair interest suggests consumer cost-saving behavior boosting industrial goods demand.

algos.name: Weekly Rise In Travelmobility Google Trends For Last Minute Flight Booking Signals Near-term Travel Demand Rebound
algos.thesis_one_liner: An increase in last minute flight booking searches indicates rising spontaneous travel demand benefiting airline and leisure sectors.

algos.name: Weekly Google Trends Surge In Home Appliance Repair Searches Signals Bullish Consumer Discretionary
algos.thesis_one_liner: An increase in DIY appliance repair searches indicates rising consumer stress on appliance replacements, boosting sales in home improvement and retail discretionary sectors.

algos.name: Weather Extremes Utility Demand Spike
algos.thesis_one_liner: When 10+ major metros log temperatures >95F or <5F for 3+ consecutive days, heating/cooling demand surges, driving utility revenue and grid pressure signals.

algos.name: Weather Extreme Disruption Energy Demand Spike
algos.thesis_one_liner: Days with extreme heat/cold >2 std dev from normal drive electricity demand spikes and boost utility/energy pricing.

algos.name: Temperature Extremes Power Demand Spike Utility Boost
algos.thesis_one_liner: Daily high temperatures exceed 95°F or fall below 0°F for 3+ consecutive days in major population centers, spiking HVAC load and electricity demand.

algos.name: Rss Count Surge For Supply Chain Bottleneck News
algos.thesis_one_liner: Daily RSS article count for supply chain topics spikes >60% above 7-day MA, signaling acute logistics stress in news cycle.

algos.name: Natural Gas Futures Volatility Pump Rotation
algos.thesis_one_liner: Unusual weekly EIA storage draws (>10% above seasonal norm) combined with rising futures volatility trigger energy sector rotation; energy stocks often lag futures by 2-5 trading days due to portfolio rebalancing.

algos.name: Google Trends Surge In Luxury Good Searches
algos.thesis_one_liner: Spikes in luxury good search interest often precede discretionary spending waves and signal consumer confidence inflection, especially around holiday seasons and bonus periods.

algos.name: Electricity Demand Collapse During Mild Weather
algos.thesis_one_liner: Sharp electricity demand collapse during unseasonably mild weather signals reduced utility revenue and weak industrial activity.

algos.name: Utility Demand Spike From Weather Extremes
algos.thesis_one_liner: When daily temperature deviation exceeds 10°F from normal AND EIA electricity demand rises >5% day-over-day, utilities face margin compression or expansion.

algos.name: Regional Earthquake Cluster Insurance Demand Spike
algos.thesis_one_liner: Clusters of 4+ earthquakes in 7 days (any US region, magnitude 3.5+) trigger 40-60% surge in insurance/inspection searches within 48 hours.

algos.name: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Diy Plumbing Repair Signals Consumer Stress Rebound
algos.thesis_one_liner: An uptick in DIY plumbing repair searches indicates rising household maintenance stress, often preceding increased discretionary spending on home goods.

algos.name: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Diy Home Repair Kit Searches
algos.thesis_one_liner: Rising interest in DIY kits reflects consumer cost-cutting and home maintenance stress.

algos.thesis_one_liner: Higher search interest reflects growing EV maintenance demand and consumer cost concerns.

algos.name: Utility Demand Surge From Heat Wave Google Trends Signals Energy Sector Strength

algos.name: Weekly Google Trends Spike For Small Business Loan Default Searches
algos.thesis_one_liner: Rising searches for small business loan defaults indicate growing financial stress in small business sector.

algos.name: Renewable Energy Rss News Volume Surge
algos.thesis_one_liner: When weekly renewable energy news story counts spike 50%+ above 12-week moving average, it correlates with policy announcements, funding approvals, and sector rotation momentum.

algos.name: Weekly Spike In Google Trends Searches For Warehouse Automation Failure Signals Bearish Xli
algos.thesis_one_liner: Increased interest in warehouse automation failures signals potential operational risks in logistics.

algos.name: Weekly Spike In Earthquake Activity Near Major Port Cities Signals Potential Freight Disruptions

algos.name: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Emergency Vehicle Repair Signals Consumer Stress Lifting Industrial Sector
algos.thesis_one_liner: Rising emergency vehicle repair searches indicate increased urgent spending and maintenance demand in industrial transportation.

algos.name: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Emergency Plumber Signals Consumer Home Repair Stress
algos.thesis_one_liner: Sudden spikes in urgent home repair search terms indicate rising consumer stress and potential discretionary spending shifts.

algos.name: Weekly Spike In Earthquake Activity In Port Regions Signals Potential Freight Logistics Disruption
algos.thesis_one_liner: Increased seismic activity near major ports often precedes supply chain disruptions impacting freight logistics and industrial sectors.

algos.thesis_one_liner: Increasing concern about truck driver shortages often signals supply chain stress in freight logistics.

algos.name: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Tech Stock Selloff Signals Rotation To Defensive Sectors
algos.thesis_one_liner: A 30%+ weekly increase in search interest for tech stock selloff indicates growing market risk aversion.

algos.name: Weekly Rise In Google Trends Searches For Emergency Hvac Repair
algos.thesis_one_liner: Increased searches for emergency HVAC repair indicate rising consumer stress from weather extremes or system failures.

algos.name: Weekly Jump In Google Trends For Urgent Home Repair Signals Rising Consumer Stress Boosting Staples Demand
algos.thesis_one_liner: Increased urgent home repair queries indicate rising consumer stress with home maintenance, driving consumer staples spending.

algos.name: Real Estate Sector Weekly Google Trends Home Buying Surge
algos.thesis_one_liner: Sharp rises in home-buying related searches often precede increased real estate market activity.

algos.name: Mortgage Refinance Wave Google Trends Surge
algos.thesis_one_liner: When mortgage refinance searches spike, it signals households are actively managing debt stress; subsequent weeks show either housing demand relief (XLY bullish) or wallet tightening (XLP bullish).

algos.name: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Diy Car Maintenance Signals Rising Auto Sector Interest
algos.thesis_one_liner: An increase in searches for DIY car maintenance often precedes higher demand for auto parts and services, reflecting consumer stress on vehicle upkeep costs.

algos.name: Daily Jump In Google Trends For Food Pantry Near Me Signals Rising Consumer Stress And Staples Demand
algos.thesis_one_liner: Spikes in food pantry searches reflect worsening consumer financial stress, often boosting staples sector demand for affordable goods.

algos.name: Weekly Google Trends Spike In Searches For Food Supply Chain Disruptions
algos.thesis_one_liner: Growing consumer interest in food supply disruptions signals potential shortages or inflation in staples.

algos.name: Travel Booking Momentum Divergence
algos.thesis_one_liner: When last-minute travel search interest exceeds early-booking interest by >20%, it signals price-sensitive consumer behavior and margin compression in hospitality and airlines.

algos.name: Earthquake Aftershock Capital Flight
algos.thesis_one_liner: Major earthquake clusters in resource-rich regions trigger short-term supply chain jitters and insurance repricing, creating XLB volatility.

algos.name: Weekly Rise In Google Trends For Unemployment Benefits Searches Signals Labor Market Stress
algos.thesis_one_liner: Increasing searches for unemployment benefits indicate rising labor market stress and potential softening in employment conditions.

algos.thesis_one_liner: Increased repair searches for air purifiers indicate consumers prioritizing indoor air quality and discretionary spending on health-related home goods.

algos.name: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Gas Station Cash Only Searches Indicates Consumer Payment Stress

algos.name: Weekly Surge In Google Trends Searches For Truck Driver Strike Signals Imminent Logistics Disruption
algos.thesis_one_liner: Increased interest in truck driver strikes often precedes actual labor actions disrupting freight transport.

algos.name: Weekly Increase In Usgs Earthquake Activity Within Key Logistics Hubs Signals Potential Freight Delays
algos.thesis_one_liner: Rising earthquake activity near major freight hubs can disrupt transport and supply chains temporarily.

algos.name: Daily Spike In Rss News Feed For Semiconductor Chip Shortage Signals Tech Sector Volatility
algos.thesis_one_liner: Sudden surge in news about chip shortages often triggers tech stock volatility and rotation.

algos.name: Financial Sector Volatility Crush Trade
algos.thesis_one_liner: When VIX drops 3+ points in a single day while the financial sector (XLF) simultaneously gaps down, it signals a washout in financial stocks despite falling macro volatility—often creating a mean-reversion bounce within days.

algos.name: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Diy Home Security Installation Signals Consumer Tech Caution
algos.thesis_one_liner: Rising interest in DIY home security reflects consumer caution and potential anxiety about personal safety, influencing spending patterns in consumer discretionary tech.

algos.name: Daily Jump In Google Trends Searches For Home Renovation Permits
algos.thesis_one_liner: An uptick in searches for home renovation permits signals increased local construction activity and consumer spending on housing.

algos.name: Consumer Discretionary Google Trends Surge For Sale Keywords
algos.thesis_one_liner: A sudden 15%+ weekly increase in search interest for 'sale' often correlates with rising consumer spending and positive momentum in discretionary stocks.

algos.name: Bank Stress Index Volatility Fear Crush Reversal
algos.thesis_one_liner: VIX spikes >25 while XLF underperforms SPY by >2%, then reverses sharply as Fed rate-cut expectations emerge, driving financials outperformance.

algos.name: Daily Jump In Google Trends For Home Renovation Loans Signals Consumer Stress Turning To Housing Sector Demand
algos.thesis_one_liner: A sudden surge in searches for renovation loans suggests increased consumer stress but also potential lift in home improvement demand.

algos.name: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Emergency Childcare Searches Signals Working Parent Stress

algos.name: Weekly Google Trends Spike For Diy Car Repair Signals Bullish Xly
algos.thesis_one_liner: Rising interest in DIY car repair indicates consumers cutting costs, potentially signaling stress but increased spending in discretionary automotive retail.

algos.name: Earthquake Activity Surge Triggers Defensive Rotation
algos.thesis_one_liner: Clusters of moderate seismic events in populated regions drive risk-off sentiment and brief rotation to defensive sectors within 2–5 trading days.

algos.name: Consumer Sentiment
algos.thesis_one_liner: Consumer Sentiment tests whether consumer behavior can reveal consumer stress or demand rotation before it shows up in sector performance.

algos.name: Algo Biscotti (Unconditional Loyalty)
algos.thesis_one_liner: Algo Biscotti (Unconditional Loyalty) tests whether source data can expose input-cost, demand, or regime pressure before sector ETFs fully react.

algos.name: Xlv Google Trends Flu Search Spike
algos.thesis_one_liner: Rising flu-related searches often precede increased healthcare sector activity and defensive buying in XLV.

algos.name: Weekly Surge In Google Trends Searches For Diy Bicycle Repair
algos.thesis_one_liner: Rising DIY bicycle repair searches suggest consumer stress on transportation costs or preference for alternative commuting.

algos.name: Ev Charger Network Expansion Sentiment Surge
algos.thesis_one_liner: Spikes in charger installation and concurrent surge in consumer searches signal bullish infrastructure narrative, lifting XLK (chip/software) and XLI (automotive) positioning.

algos.name: Daily Spike In Google Trends Searches For Electric Vehicle Battery Replacement
algos.thesis_one_liner: A sudden daily jump in EV battery replacement searches indicates rising repair costs or aging EV fleet stress.

algos.name: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Emergency Plumbing Repair Signals Consumer Stress Lifting Discretionary Sector
algos.thesis_one_liner: Increasing emergency repair interest reflects consumer urgency and discretionary service demand.

algos.thesis_one_liner: Increasing news reports about food bank demand reflect rising consumer hardship, pressuring consumer staples demand.

algos.name: Weekly Rise In Rss Count For Labor Strike News Signals Industrial Sector Risk
algos.thesis_one_liner: An increase in labor strike news volume indicates rising union activity and potential production disruptions in industrial sectors.

algos.name: Google Trends Surge In Mortgage Refinance Calculator Signals Rate-sensitive Financial Stress
algos.thesis_one_liner: Household financial decision-making spikes when mortgage rates move sharply; refinance inquiry volume predicts consumer confidence and housing demand shifts 1-2 weeks ahead.

algos.name: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Industrial Robotics Maintenance Signals Upcoming Capex In Industrial Tech
algos.thesis_one_liner: Rising interest in industrial robotics maintenance correlates with increased investment and expansion in automation.

algos.name: Weekly Rise In Google Trends Searches For Gas Price Protest Signals Bearish Xle
algos.thesis_one_liner: Increasing consumer interest in gas price protests often indicates rising fuel costs and consumer dissatisfaction, pressuring energy demand.

algos.thesis_one_liner: Spikes in earthquake activity can signal increased volatility and risk aversion in financial markets.

algos.name: Seismic Activity Construction Halt Signal
algos.thesis_one_liner: Clusters of moderate earthquakes (M4.5+) in major construction zones halt projects, disrupt supply chains, and create insurance/liability spikes in affected regions.

algos.name: Daily Spike In Rss Counts For Corporate Layoff Announcements Signals Consumer Discretionary Headwind
algos.thesis_one_liner: Rising news of corporate layoffs signals weakening economic sentiment and potential reduction in consumer discretionary spending.

algos.name: Weekly Surge In Job Postings For Warehouse Workers Signals Bullish Xli
algos.thesis_one_liner: Growing demand for warehouse labor indicates rising industrial activity and goods movement.

algos.name: Port Congestion Squeeze
algos.thesis_one_liner: Surges in port activity can signal supply chain bottlenecks and inventory shortages that impact multiple sectors.

algos.name: Oil Price Momentum Reversal Energy Sector Bounce
algos.thesis_one_liner: When crude oil closes down 3+ days straight but bounces 2%+ on the 4th day and XLE lags, mean reversion pressure builds; XLE outperforms over next 5 days.

algos.name: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Moving Services Signals Rising Labor Demand And Housing Activity
algos.thesis_one_liner: A sudden increase in searches for moving services often precedes higher labor demand in housing-related sectors.

algos.name: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Job Quitting Signals Labor Market Churn Stress
algos.thesis_one_liner: Rising interest in quitting jobs signals increased labor market churn and potential wage inflation pressure.

algos.name: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Emergency Dental Surgery Signals Healthcare Consumer Stress
algos.thesis_one_liner: Rising urgent dental surgery searches indicate heightened healthcare stress and demand.

algos.name: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Home Heating Oil Price Signals Energy Sector Inflation
algos.thesis_one_liner: Rising consumer interest in heating oil prices reflects increasing energy costs feeding into inflationary pressure.

algos.name: Utilities Sector Negative Price Gap Fill

algos.name: Luxury Discretionary Google Trends Collapse Signal
algos.thesis_one_liner: When luxury goods search interest drops 40%+ below 12-week average, wealthy consumer demand is evaporating, signaling discretionary squeeze and consumer confidence fade.

algos.name: Grocery Price Inflation Google Trends Spike Signals Consumer Staples Demand

algos.name: Daily Spike In Rss News Counts Around Labor Union Contract Negotiation Signals Bearish Xlf
algos.thesis_one_liner: Heightened news flow about union contract talks often precedes labor disruptions affecting financial sector clients.

algos.name: Healthcare Sector Google Trends Spike In Flu Symptoms
algos.thesis_one_liner: A 20%+ weekly increase in flu symptom searches often precedes healthcare sector strength due to expected increased demand.

algos.name: Daily Spike In Rss Counts For New Labor Union Formations Signals Labor Market Shift
algos.thesis_one_liner: Increased news flow about new labor unions correlates with rising labor activism and potential wage pressure.

algos.name: Daily Spike In Laborjobs Google Trends For Temporary Job Openings Signals Labor Market Tightening And Industrial Strength
algos.thesis_one_liner: A rise in temporary job openings search interest suggests strong labor demand, often signaling industrial sector growth.

algos.name: Daily Jump In Google Trends For Home Appliance Repair Signals Consumer Stress Lifting Consumer Staples
algos.thesis_one_liner: Rising searches for appliance repair indicate household cost pressures, which tend to increase demand for consumer staples as budgets shift.

algos.thesis_one_liner: A daily spike in searches indicates rising consumer or regulatory interest in EV battery lifecycle management and sustainability.
